questionHtml:
Which properties can be monitored to determine the rate of the reaction?

Fe (s) + CuSO4 (aq) → Cu (s) + FeSO4 (aq)

    I. change in volume
    II. change in temperature
    III. change in colour

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: Which properties can be monitored to determine the rate of the reaction? Fe (s) + CuSO4 (aq) → Cu (s) + FeSO4 (aq) I. change in volume II. change in temperature III. change in colo
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
